entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop, Pennisetum glaucum, evaluated for performance in intercropping systems.

entities.name: LCIC-MV1
entities.description: A specific cultivar of pearl millet used in the field experiment.

entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in intercropping systems with pearl millet.

entities.name: IT 90K 277-2
entities.description: A specific cultivar of cowpea used in the improved intercropping system.

entities.name: TRADITIONAL INTERCROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: A cropping system where pearl millet and cowpea are sown in a 1:1 ratio.

entities.name: IMPROVED INTERCROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: A cropping system where 2 rows of pearl millet cv. LCIC-MV1 are cropped with 4 rows of cowpea cv. IT 90K 277-2.

entities.name: NIGERIA
entities.description: The country where the field experiment was conducted.

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The research approach used to determine the performance of the crops in 1999.

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of vegetative biomass produced by pearl millet.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced by pearl millet.
